How to Make Scrambled Eggs

 Scrambled eggs are a quick, and easy light meal. You need two fresh eggs, milk, butter, salt and pepper. You also need a mixing bowl, a tablespoon, a fork and a frying pan. First, break the eggs into the bowl. Then, add about three tablespoons of milk, the salt and the pepper. Beat the mixture with a fork until it is well mixed. Next, melt a small piece of butter in the frying pan over low heat. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and let it heat through. Then, turn up the heat slightly. As the eggs cook, push them around gently with the fork. When the scrambled eggs are done to perfection, they should be light and fluffy. In just a few minutes, you can sit down and enjoy tour delicious meal.

Here are a few instructions for typing in English. English sentences begin with a capital letter, and they usually end with a period. Hold the shift key down and type a letter to make a capital letter. Use the space bar to put one space between words. Also, put one space after a comma and two spaces after a period. Do not put a space between a word and a comma or period. Do not hit the enter key at the end of a line.
 Use the enter key when you come to the end of a paragraph. Then, you can start the new paragraph on a new line.

Writing in English

Hold the shift key down and type a letter to make a capital letter. Use the space bar to put one space between words. Also, put one space after a comma and two spaces after a period.  Use the enter key when you come to the end of a paragraph. Then, you can start the new paragraph on a new line.

How to Make Scrambled Eggs

 Scrambled eggs are a quick and easy light meal. You need two fresh eggs, milk, butter, salt and pepper. You also need a mixing bowl, a tablespoon, a fork and a frying pan. First, break the eggs into the bowl. Then add about three tablespoons of milk, the salt and the pepper. Beat the mixture with a fork until it is well mixed. Next, melt a small piece of butter in the frying pan over low heat. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and left it heat through. Then turn up the heat slightly. As the eggs cook, push them around gently with the fork. When the scrambled eggs are done to prefect, they should be light and fluffy. In just a few minutes, you can sit down and enjoy your delicious meal.

The scientists elaborated a questionnaire to test the perception of personality in many countries:

- A first sample of volunteers judged their own personality according to the questionnaire. 
- A second sample of people judged the first group. Each person in that sample judge a person he knows in the first sample.
-A third sample of people judged their perception of a typical personality of their culture.
Then the scientists compare the three averages of the three samples.
The results show that the first and second average are close to each other. However the third average is far different from the two in most countries.
Conclusion: there was not concordance between the "typical personality" and what they actually measured.

How to Make Scrambled Eggs

 Scrambled eggs are a quick and easy light meal. You need two fresh eggs, milk, butter, butter, salt and pepper. You also need a mixing bowl, a tablespoon, a fork and a frying pan. First, break the eggs into the bowl. Then add about three tablespoons of milk, the salt and the pepper. Beat the mixture with a fork until it is well mixed. Next, melt a small piece of butter in the frying pan over low heat. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and let it heat through. Then turn up the heat slightly. As the eggs cook, push them around gently with the fork. When the scrambled eggs are done to perfection, they should be light and fluffy. In just a few minutes you can sit down and enjoy your delicious meal.

My country, Japan, consists of four big islands and many small islands and located in the east end of Asia. Traditionally, there have been the Ainu and Ryukyuans besides the major group, but their population size has been very small. Recently, the number of Korean Japanese and foreigners who come to Japan as labors has increased. There is a variety of Japanese cuisine, some of which have their roots in different countries. For example, Japanese curry, which came from India via England, has some unique aspects and totally differs from Indian curry.

In college, students have many responsibilities, and one of them is to understand the rules of the university. International students may be confused by some of these rules. In the majority of American schools, smoking is not allowed in cafeterias, dormitories, and student unions. However, in most classrooms, food and drinks may be consumed. According to the Merriam Webster Online Dictionary, plagiarism is an act of fraud. It involves both stealing someone else's work and lying about it afterward. But it includes the meaning that is to use (another's production) without crediting the source.

All of the following are considered plagiarism:
-turning in someone else's work as your own
-copying words or ideas from someone else without giving credit
-failing to put a quotation in quotation marks
-giving incorrect information about the source of a quotation
-changing words but copying the sentence structure of a source without giving credit
-copying so many words or ideas from a source that it makes up the majority of your work, whether you give credit or not (see our section on "fair use" rules)

How to Make Scrambled Eggs


 Scrambled eggs are quick and easy light meal. You need two fresh eggs milk butter salt and pepper. You also need a mixing bowl, a tablespoon, a fork, and frying pan. First, break the eggs into the bowl. Then add about three tablespoons of milk the salt and the pepper. Beat the mixture with a fork until it is well mixed. Next, melt a small piece of butter in the prying pan over low heat. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and let it heat through. Then turn up the heat slightly. As the eggs cook push, them around gently with the fork. When the scrambled eggs are done to perfection, they should be light and fluffy. In just a few minutes, you can sit down and enjoy your delicious meal.

How to make Ice Cream in a bag.
Surprise your friends on your next camping trip by making ice cream in a plastic bag. First, put ½ cup of heavy cream, ½ cup of milk, ¼ cup of sugar, and ¼ teaspoon of vanilla into a quart-size sealable plastic bag then close the quart-size bag and seal it tightly. The next step put 2 cups of ice and ½ to ¾ cup of salt into a gallon-size sealable plastic bag. Now place the sealed quart bag inside the gallon bag of ice and salt. Next, seal the gallon bag securely. After that, gently rock the gallon bag from side to side for ten to fifteen minutes or until the contents of the quart bag have turned into cream. Finally, open the bags, grab a spoon, and enjoy your ice cream!

Although it is produced a lot of luxury cars in Germany, Trabant preserves its appeal.

If do you want to try new thing, you can make a bookcase by yourself. It is not difficult to make a bookcase, when you follow these steps. First, you assemble these thngs; wood, nails, glue, a hammer, a saw, sandpaper, and paint. Second, cut a wood two sde pieces 11 5/8'' by 28'' there pieces for top, bottom, and shelf, 11 5/8'' by 13 1/2'' one back pece 15'' by 28 two 10'' molding strips. After that, sand each piece of wood, and glue one molding strip to each side piece, 14'' down from top. Third, nail side pieces to bottom, and nail the top in place. Fourth, nail the back piece in place. After, paint the bookcase, and shelf. Fifth, let dry two hours. Last, slide the shelf into place. Finally bookcase is ready for use.

I don't remember the worst meal experience and also I can't say a meal this is the best meal experience for me. Because Turkish cuisine has many delicious meals. But I can describe a nice Turkish meal. It's called BOREK. Borek is a dish making by a dough and meat or cheese. First you need to have a paper thin dough by a rolling pin. Between every paper thin dough you need to spead well melted butter. After 5-6 times you do put meat or vegetable mixture in it. Than cover the ingredients with 5-6 times dough. And replicate the same process as before. Later spead two egg and butter mixture on it. After cooking at the oven it's ready to eat.
